prompt: A candid, warm-toned photograph of two men sitting at a table in a {argument name="setting" default="dimly lit upscale restaurant at night"}. On the left is a {argument name="left person description" default="man with dark hair wearing a dark grey crewneck sweater"}. On the right is a {argument name="right person description" default="man with glasses and receding curly dark hair wearing a dark blue sweater over a collared shirt"}. They are {argument name="emotion and action" default="celebrating enthusiastically, mouths wide open cheering, clasping one hand together while raising their other fists in triumph"}. The table is covered with a white tablecloth and features two menus with the text "THE GREENE", water glasses, a glass of red wine, and a small lit candle in a ribbed glass holder. The background shows blurred restaurant interiors and dark windows with distant city lights, creating an intimate and joyful atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张色调温暖的抓拍照片，两名男子坐在 {argument name="setting" default="夜晚灯光昏暗的高端餐厅"} 的餐桌旁。左侧是 {argument name="left person description" default="一位留着深色头发、身穿深灰色圆领毛衣的男子"}。右侧是 {argument name="right person description" default="一位戴着眼镜、留着深色卷发且发际线后移、身穿深蓝色毛衣内搭衬衫的男子"}。他们正在 {argument name="emotion and action" default="热情地庆祝，张大嘴巴欢呼，一只手紧紧握在一起，另一只手握拳高举，以示胜利"}。餐桌上铺着白色桌布，摆放着两份印有“THE GREENE”字样的菜单、水杯、一杯红酒以及一个放在罗纹玻璃烛台里的小蜡烛。背景呈现出模糊的餐厅内景和带有远处城市灯光的深色窗户，营造出一种亲密而欢乐的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 两名男子在餐厅庆祝：一张两名男子在高端餐厅餐桌旁热情庆祝的抓拍照片。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
